proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +42.4pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Portfolio is 98.25% concentrated in Bull regime with 56/57 UP_TRI positions; if regime whipsaws back to Bear, active UP_TRI exposure would immediately match this promoted cohort — monitor for regime transition to Bear coinciding with existing UP_TRI open book
D-8 R-multiple review pending per project_anchor §7; if forced Day-6 exits are inflating WR relative to R, tier may need re-examination
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +42.4pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +42.4pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below the Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Bull (shifting, day 3), so the cohort is dormant and the flagged 98.25% Bull concentration on 57 open positions is not compounded by a Bear-gated promotion. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-07-01) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.9pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Bull (shifting, day 3), so the cohort is dormant; portfolio Bear exposure is 0 and the flagged 98.25% concentration is on Bull, so a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion does not compound the concentration risk and may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 07-01) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector (Bank cell) = Bull regime 98.25%; UP_TRI signal 98.25%; UP_TRI×Bull×Bank cell 21.05% (98.2%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector (Bank cell) = Bull regime 98.25%; UP_TRI signal 98.25%; UP_TRI×Bull×Bank cell 21.05%; recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND specifically block additions to sector=Bank until Bank cell drops below 18% via natural Day-6 exits; hedge net Bull-directional exposure with an index short or defensive-sector long (e.g., Pharma/FMCG) sized to ~15-20% of book delta.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Bull→Choppy or Bull→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire book simultaneously (98% single-direction), with the 21% Bank cluster amplifying drawdown via correlated sector unwind; because the Bull×UP_TRI cohort is only Candidate-tier (n=4), there is no statistical edge basis to absorb this drawdown.

evidence: UP_TRI×Bull×Bank cell at 0.2105 breaches 0.20 cell threshold (12 of 57 positions)
UP_TRI signal_type share at 56/57 = 0.9825, above 0.85 threshold — effective directional-long monoculture
Matched Bull×UP_TRI cohort only Candidate tier (n=4) — concentration is unvalidated edge
Three additional concentrated cells on same unvalidated cohort: Energy 15.79%, Infra 14.04%, Other 14.04%
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Bull regime 98.25%; UP_TRI signal 98.25%; UP_TRI×Bull×Bank cell 21.05%
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND specifically block additions to sector=Bank until Bank cell drops below 18% via natural Day-6 exits; hedge net Bull-directional exposure with an index short or defensive-sector long (e.g., Pharma/FMCG) sized to ~15-20% of book delta.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Bull→Choppy or Bull→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire book simultaneously (98% single-direction), with the 21% Bank cluster amplifying drawdown via correlated sector unwind; because the Bull×UP_TRI cohort is only Candidate-tier (n=4), there is no statistical edge basis to absorb this drawdown.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 0.9825 (Bull, well above the 0.80 threshold) AND the UP_TRI×Bull×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 21.05% (12 of 57 positions). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 56/57 = 98.2% (above 0.85 threshold), making the book a near-monoculture directional long. Matched Bull×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=4) — unvalidated edge across all four concentrated cells (Bank 21.05%, Energy 15.79%, Infra 14.04%, Other 14.04%).
